rows.requirement: Reusable harness spins up a configurable number of goroutines

rows.test: harness.go Run() uses an internal chan sample fed by all worker goroutines; exercised by all TestHarness* tests
TestHarnessAggregatesConcurrentSamples asserts Result wraps *hdrhistogram.Histogram and P50/P95/P99 are internally consistent

rows.requirement: go test ./engine/loadtest/... -run TestHarness: run a trivial workload through the harness, assert histogram output has expected sample count
Error handling in results (not explicit in issue but needed for reuse by 6.3.4 which asserts no-data-loss)

rows.test: Run(cfg Config, work WorkFunc) is target-agnostic (caller supplies work); not directly testable here, confirmed by design review in architecture-discovery.md
